JCI Gives Up Early Rebound, Trades Volatile on Iran Conflict and Subsidy Concerns
body: Stocks opened higher but quickly slipped into the red, reflecting caution over oil-driven subsidy costs and unresolved geopolitical risks.

title: Middle East Tensions Begin to Hit Indonesia’s Petrochemical Industry
body: Indonesia’s petrochemical industry faces supply risks from Middle East tensions, prompting a shift to alternative feedstocks.

title: Indonesia Raises Airline Fuel Surcharge by 38% Amid Global Oil Surge
body: Indonesia raises airline fuel surcharge by 38% to offset rising jet fuel costs while balancing industry sustainability and consumer impact.

title: A $152.7 Million Move: Indonesia Unveils 13% Airfare Hike Cap
body: Indonesia has introduced a 13% domestic airfare cap in response to the Iran war turbulence, effective immediately.

title: Indonesia Rules Out Subsidized Fuel Price Hike as Oil Nears $120 per Barrel
body: Indonesia will keep subsidized fuel prices unchanged through 2026 despite oil nearing $120 per barrel, citing fiscal resilience.

title: Oil, Outflows, and MSCI Jitters Push JCI Off the 7,000 Edge
body: The index slipped as inflation fears, rising oil prices, and potential MSCI-linked outflows weighed on sentiment.

title: Indonesia’s Q1 Budget Deficit Nears 1% of GDP Amid Early-Year Spending Push
body: The government and the House of Representatives have agreed to cap the full-year 2026 budget deficit at no more than 3% of GDP.

title: Indonesia, Malaysia, Brunei Launch ASEAN Fertilizer Alliance to Bolster Food Security
body: Indonesia, Malaysia, and Brunei form SEAFA to strengthen fertilizer supply, food security, and regional industry resilience.

title: Plastic Prices Soar 50% Across Indonesia, Pramono Assures Inflation Stability
body: Plastic prices surge 30–50% nationwide amid supply disruptions, but Pramono says inflation remains under control.

title: OPEC+ Raises Output by 206,000 bpd, but Hormuz Disruption Pushes Oil Prices to $120
body: OPEC+ will raise output by 206,000 bpd in May, but the increase is unlikely to ease markets as Hormuz disruptions choke global supply.

title: Gold Retreats Further, Antam Drops from Weekend Level
body: Down Rp 26,000 as global sentiment weakens amid elevated interest rate expectations.

title: JCI Falls as MSCI Jitters, IDX Reforms Weigh on Market
body: JCI falls as MSCI adjustment risks from IDX reforms, rupiah weakness, and surging oil prices weigh on investor sentiment.

title: Indonesia Rents Extra Warehouses as Rice Stocks Hit Record Levels
body: Indonesia rents extra warehouses as rice stocks near 5m tons, marking record levels and boosting food security.

title: Pizza Hut Indonesia Returns to Rp 24 Billion Profit After 2024 Loss
body: Pizza Hut Indonesia returns to profit in 2025 with Rp 24.75b net income, driven by higher sales and improved margins.

title: Iran-US Escalation Sends Freight Rates Soaring, Threatens Indonesia’s Trade
body: Iran-US tensions disrupt shipping lanes, tripling freight costs and raising risks for Indonesia’s trade, inflation and manufacturing sector

title: IDX Loses $12.4 Billion in Value Amid Iran Conflict and Oil Price Surge
body: IDX market cap falls Rp 211t this week as geopolitical tensions and oil prices rise, with continued foreign outflows.

title: West Sumatra Restricts Entry of Alfamart, Indomaret to Boost Local Economy
body: West Sumatra limits expansion of national retail chains to protect SMEs and promote local economic growth.

title: IDX Flags Eight Firms with High Ownership Concentration in First Disclosure
body: IDX names eight firms with highly concentrated ownership, flagging potential liquidity risks in first-ever disclosure list.

title: OJK Flags Listed Firms with High Ownership Concentration
body: OJK to launch list flagging firms with concentrated ownership, enhancing transparency and helping investors assess liquidity risks.

title: KB Bank Swings to Profit After Rp 6 Trillion Loss
body: KB Bank posts Rp 66.6b profit in 2025 after Rp 6.3t loss, driven by better asset quality, margins and lower provisioning costs.
